subject: refactor(dashboard): migrate form inputs to DaisyUI select/input
body:
Phase 8 of the DaisyUI component-class migration. Replace the last
custom form-control classes with DaisyUI's select and input components
so they stay visually consistent with the rest of the migrated UI and
pick up theme tokens automatically.

- SettingsPane work hour selects: filter-select -> select select-bordered select-sm
- FilterSidebar date inputs: filter-input filter-date-input -> input input-bordered input-sm w-full
- styles.css: delete .filter-select, .filter-select:focus, .filter-input,
  .filter-input:focus, and .filter-date-input rules (replaced with pointer
  comments so future readers can find the migrated component).
- .filter-date-group layout helper is kept (still used as the flex column
  wrapper around the two date inputs).

Tags: ui, refactor, daisyui, migration
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-component-migration
Semver: patch
